docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-01-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER ABSOLUTELYNEW, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORP. AS TO RESPONDENT MCDANIEL, CAMMIE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; MEMO P/A; POS FILED BY PETITIONER ABSOLUTELYNEW, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORP. HEARING SET FOR MAR-01-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ABSOLUTELYNEW, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COURT TO FURTHER REVIEW THE PROPOSED ORDER AND JUDGMENT SUBMITTED BY PETITIONER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED WITHOUT PAYMENT OF MONEY BY EITHER PARTY TO THE OTHER (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award; Memo P/A; Pos
Off Calendar Mar-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anthony Flores, Esq., General Counsel, Tel. 415.865.6200.x1123, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ABSOLUTELYNEW, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Court to further review the proposed order and judgment submitted by petitioner. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
